changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE product_uom_conversion ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL, from_uom_id BIGINT NOT NULL, to_uom_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
factor NUMERIC(18,6) NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT fk_conv_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
CONSTRAINT fk_conv_from_uom FOREIGN KEY (from_uom_id) REFERENCES uom(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_conv_to_uom FOREIGN KEY (to_uom_id) REFERENCES uom(id) );
